notes:
Renaming 'Movies' directory (like in Squad) allows game to start, connect to muiltiplayer server and render spawn screen. However, client is immediately disconnected with 'EAC Sandbox not active(dummy client)' error.
Since the game has no singleplayer modes yet, it is unplayable at all.

notes: Game loads up great until I join a server. Then I get kicked almost immediately after the choice of choosing a side pops up with an error about easy anti-cheat. A real shame because I really want to try this game. For those that do want to play a similar working game, check out Squad.
